siteTitle: Damian Cyntler — Software Developer, programming and music enthusiast.
myHistoryContent: Since 2009, I have been building my experience across technology and digital product development. I combine a software background with a broader focus on product thinking, quality, and usability, treating technology as a practical tool for solving real problems.
whatDoContent: I work as a Software Developer, designing and delivering solutions tailored to specific business needs. I am also interested in music, audio technology, and music production, especially where creativity meets modern tools.
